description: Per-invocation pair_rail_case emit baseline. The hook MUST emit exactly one pair_rail_case event per Pair-Rail evaluation (one per matrix-relevant decision arm: A/B/F). This invariant existed pre-Wave-B (enforce path) and MUST hold post-Wave-B (advisory path). Drift > 10% over a rolling 7-day window during the 30-day soak triggers wave-b-rollback-PR.md.
